response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive software engineering experience across diverse technologies and has an entrepreneurial background, including recent involvement with AI-agent infrastructure. He meets the minimum experience and education requirements and shows a strong inclination for knowledge sharing. However, the resume lacks clear evidence of deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML strategy and a track record of advising strategic customers on advanced AI technologies, which are crucial for a Principal Engineer in an AI Strategy role.
strengths: Over 18 years of diverse software engineering experience.
Experience as a founder, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure development.
concerns: Limited demonstrated deep or recognized expertise in AI/ML strategy.
Lack of explicit experience advising strategic customers on AI.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred).
